final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live-stream featuring 神仙姐姐 holding a sign during a broadcast.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 9:16 vertical screen layout with typical 抖音 live-stream UI overlay (viewer count, comments, gift animations, username bar, etc.)
Subject: must include 神仙姐姐 as the live-stream host, holding a handwritten sign in front of her
Scene/backdrop: must include a typical indoor live-stream room setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, bright live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" (on the sign held by the host, handwritten style)
Constraints: must preserve the 抖音 live-stream screenshot format with realistic UI elements visible on screen
Avoid:
